---
title: "06. 离散算术与结构递推"
subtitle: "Discrete Arithmetic and Structural Recurrence"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 6
categories: [elements, cultural, omega]
description: "How Books VII-IX embed divisibility, recurrence, and number classification inside a geometric program."
---

**Books:** Book VII, VIII, IX  
**Omega Directions:** `fibonacci growth`, `ring arithmetic`, `dynamical systems`

{{< include articles/category_06_discrete_arithmetic_and_structural_recurrence.md >}}

---

[Back to Elements Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
